benefits.description: Noticed effects within minutes of administration; described as pretty intense.

side_effects.description: Intense immediate effect that was managed by splitting dosage into two half-doses per day.

protocol_notes: Self-described as experienced with injections. Split dosage into 2x daily to manage intensity. Considering another run. Also has extensive personal DMT experience (500+ times) and disputes OP's claim that epitalon's effects are DMT-like.
